prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约2093名、3802名、2105名、3954名、4951名，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2846名；2025年基准约4951名 ，为近五年最低水平（最容易进），显示竞争持续缓解；该校在广西物理类招生计划：2021年39人、2022年44人、2023年47人、2024年47人、2025年37人；2026 年计划36人，较2025年缩招1人（-2.7%），小幅缩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第19名（Top20） ，近年排名稳定在第19位，学校层次极高；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理或回应类事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第37位（较热）， 短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；2022年曾在江西出现投档线异常（低关注），但近年未见明显断档信号；心理学A+、教育学A+、数学A、地理学A+、统计学A、环境 科学与工程A等，理科基础学科实力雄厚，对理工类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工科专业社会热度高热推荐，北师大相 关专业（计算机、人工智能、统计等）受益于整体工科热度上升；广西2026年高考总人数约39.2万，物理类按近年占比约67.4%估算约26.4万人，较2025年26.0万人增加约1.5%， 考生规模小幅扩大。；北京师范大学位于北京，属全国性顶尖高校，在广 西无特殊地域偏好；该校全国招生总人数中广西占比约2%-3%，属正常招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招2.7%、广西物理类考生增加 约1.5%、理工科专业热度高涨等因素，缩招与考生增加共同推高竞争，但历年位次后移惯性较大。预测2026年物理类最低位次约4821名，区间4321–5321名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 2093, 3802, 2105, 3954, and 4951 respectively, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2846 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4951, the lowest level in the past five years (easiest to enter), indicating continued easing of competition; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi: 39 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 47 in 2024, 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 36, a reduction of 1 (-2.7%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 19th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable at 19th in recent years, very high level; 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management or response incidents, no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 37th (relatively hot), short video platform exposure moderately high; in 2022, there was an abnormal admission score line in Jiangxi (low attention), but no obvious gap signal in recent years; Psychology A+, Education A+, Mathematics A, Geography A+, Statistics A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, etc., strong basic science disciplines, strong attraction for science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other science and engineering majors are highly recommended due to social heat; BNU's related majors (Computer, Artificial Intelligence, Statistics, etc.) benefit from the overall rise in engineering popularity; Guangxi's total number of college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 392,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 264,000 based on the recent proportion of about 67.4%, an increase of about 1.5% from 260,000 in 2025, a slight expansion of candidate scale; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a top national university, with no special regional preference in Guangxi; the proportion of Guangxi in the university's total national enrollment is about 2%-3%, a normal enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction of 2.7% in the 2026 plan, the increase of about 1.5% in Physics Category candidates in Guangxi, and the high popularity of science and engineering majors, the reduction and increase in candidates jointly push up competition, but the inertia of historical ranking backward shift is large. Predict the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 to be about 4821, with a range of 4321–5321.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4321–5321, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4300), focus on sprinting for popular majors like Science Experimental Class (Liyun) and Computer Science and Technology; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 5300), use Tier 3 majors such as Biological Science Class and Education Class as safety, and avoid discouraged majors like biology, chemistry, environment, and materials.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 200, 588, 198, 355, and 257 respectively. The rankings fluctuated significantly over the past five years, with a baseline of about 257 in 2025, showing a clear forward shift compared to 2024 (intensified competition), but overall in a volatile pattern. The university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for History Category: 22 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 16 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 18, an increase of 2 (+12.5%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 19th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings around 19th in recent years, indicating an extremely high university level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management or response incidents, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms. In 2022, there was an abnormal admission score line in Jiangxi (low attention), but no significant gap signals have been seen in recent years. 18 disciplines, including Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Geography A+, and Marxist Theory A+, have been rated A- or above, with top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates in teacher training, literature, history, and philosophy fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors shows a divergent wait-and-see trend, but as the top national institution for teacher training, BNU's brand effect is prominent. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Guangxi in 2026 is approximately 392,000, with History Category estimated at about 128,000 based on the recent proportion of about 32.6%, an increase of about 7.2% compared to 119,000 in 2025, with the expansion of the candidate pool driving up competition. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a top national university with no special regional preference in Guangxi. The proportion of Guangxi in the university's total national enrollment is about 2%-3%, which is a normal enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking volatility, a 12.5% expansion in the 2026 plan, an approximately 7.2% increase in History Category candidates in Guangxi, neutral university reputation, and divergent popularity of teacher training majors, the expansion rate exceeds the candidate growth rate, slightly easing competition, but BNU's brand effect still supports relatively high popularity. The predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 291, with a range of 241–341.
